title: Figures and dataset- Chelangarimiyandoab et al
author: Chelangarimiyandoab, Forough
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The file " Updated Figures with corresponding data_May 26_2026.zip " contains all Figures and their corresponding dataset used for generating the figures. Each figure has a corresponding folder with a sub-folder containing the figure as "pdf" or "ai" illustrator file, a second sub-folder with corresponding Excel files, a third sub-folder with corresponding individual graphs in "pdf" format and a final sub-folder with corresponding GraphPad Prism file. 
 The file " Supplementary Material complete.pdf " contains two tables: one with a list of primers and probe sequences used for quantitative PCR analysis and the other with a list of antibodies used for flow cytometry analysis. It also contains a supplementary figure reporting the correlation between inoculated UPEC dose and recovered CFU 24h after infection in bladder and kidneys of WT or HO mice.
